title: cachrys arenaria
intro: Cachrys arenaria, also known as rock tansy, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the carrot family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as bloating, gas, and indigestion, due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory properties. Rock tansy has been valued for its health benefits, including its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and lower fever. Herbal preparations of Cachrys arenaria can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although its safety and efficacy should be verified by a medical professional.
